title: Update Location Columns with lat/long
excerpt: We’re attempting to add a Lat/Lng to a location column thorough the API but it doesn’t appear like it’s currently possible.  There was a thread regarding it but it only states that it’s no longer supported in the new api…

posts.author: darren (Darren Wiebe)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re attempting to add a Lat/Lng to a location column thorough the API but it doesn’t appear like it’s currently possible. There was a thread regarding it but it only states that it’s no longer supported in the new api. Is there an ETA when this will be rolled out?

[RELEASED] Location Column no longer accepted? Feature Requests - API and Apps Framework
I was working on a script that adds appointments to monday using locations. As of last Friday, Nov 29, 2019, the api would accept the location info. All of a sudden this week I am getting errors saying the column is not valid. Did something happen? Why are locations no longer available? mutation { create_item( board_id: ######, group_id: “topics”, item_name: “Douglas, WY”, column_values: “{“date4”:{“date”:“2019-06-03”},“hour”:{“hour”:19,“minute”:30},“month”:{“index”:6},“status4”:{“index”:5…

posts.author: ChrisCollins (Chris Collins)
posts.cookedHtml: Also waiting for an ETA on this.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chris and Darren, Dipro here!

I don’t have a specific ETA on this feature, but we do know that the Location column is important to a lot of our clients. We’ve got it on our roadmap and are prioritizing it alongside the other API requests we are receiving.

posts.author: ChrisCollins (Chris Collins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dipro, has there been any progress on adding the location column to the API?

Or is there a way to import an address into a normal text field and have that update a location column somehow?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ChrisCollins – no update yet.

There is no way to convert a text field into the location either, because we cannot validate the data going into it (yet). I’ll update on this thread when we have any news.

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
News about the support of the import function or a column update?

If I have 500 lines, copy / paste by hand, it’s not simple

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Yann, no news just yet but we’re prioritizing it in our backlog! I can’t give a timeline for certain, but we’ve discussed this internally and want to add it in the upcoming iterations.

posts.author: Omer_Ametos (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any update on this feature?
Is there any ETA on the location column API?

Thanks

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Omer_Ametos,

Check out my newest update as we just released this feature: [RELEASED] Updating Location column with API!.

Hope this helps!
Helen
